title: MYKAGS 6 Pack 190ml Champagne Flutes Crystal Prosecco Glass Set, Elegant Durable Design Smooth Polished Edges Enhance Tasting Experience for Champagne Cocktail
features: - Handcrafted Elegance: Each of our 6 Champagne flutes is meticulously handcrafted by skilled artisans, ensuring a refined and durable design with smooth, polished edges to enhance your tasting experience.

- Enhanced Flavor Experience: Our high-quality champagne flutes elevate the flavor by 30%, while their lightweight walls provide a delicate aesthetic, making them perfect for adding a touch of restaurant-level elegance to any celebration.

- Perfect Gift Idea: Ideal for personal use or as a thoughtful gift, this champagne flute set is perfect for anniversaries, weddings, Christmas, or family gatherings, leaving a lasting impression at every special occasion.
- Premium Quality Materials: Made from durable, crystal clear lead-free glass, our champagne flutes ensure that the true quality and characteristics of your champagne are perfectly showcased.
description: Product Description Elevate your celebrations with our exquisite 6-Pack Champagne Flute set, meticulously handcrafted by skilled artisans. Each flute is a testament to fine craftsmanship, featuring smooth, polished edges that enhance your tasting experience. Designed to perfection, our champagne glasses not only exude elegance but also ensure durability, making them a staple for special occasions. Dimensions: - Top Diameter: 42mm - Bottom Diameter: 70mm - Height: 262mm - Capacity: 190ml - Weight: 174g
